sentences.arabic: يُمَثِّلُ الصَّبْرُ عِنْدَ الصَّدْمَةِ الْأُولَى ذِرْوَةَ الْإِيمَانِ بِالْقَضَاءِ وَالْقَدَرِ، وَهُوَ مَقَامٌ لَا يَبْلُغُهُ إِلَّا مَنْ فَقِهَ حِكْمَةَ اللهِ فِي تَقَلُّبَاتِ الْأَحْوَالِ.
sentences.translation: Strpljenje (sabr) pri prvom udarcu predstavlja vrhunac vjerovanja u Božije određenje (kada' i kader), a to je stepen koji dostiže samo onaj ko razumije Allahovu mudrost u promjenama stanja.
sentences.translationEn: Patience (Sabr) at the first stroke of calamity represents the pinnacle of faith in Divine Decree (Qada and Qadar), a station reached only by those who understand Allah's wisdom in the changing of circumstances.

sentences.arabic: فَالْمُؤْمِنُ يَتَقَلَّبُ بَيْنَ شُكْرٍ عَلَى نِعْمَةٍ وَصَبْرٍ عَلَى مِحْنَةٍ، وَكِلَاهُمَا خَيْرٌ لَهُ فِي مِيزَانِ الشَّرْعِ.
sentences.translation: Vjernik se kreće između zahvalnosti na blagodati i strpljenja u iskušenju, a oboje je za njega dobro na vagi šerijata.
sentences.translationEn: A believer alternates between gratitude for a blessing and patience during an ordeal, both of which are good for him in the scales of the Sharia.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ أَوْضَحَ النَّبِيُّ - صَلَّى اللهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ - أَنَّ شَأْنَ الْمُؤْمِنِ كُلَّهُ عَجَبٌ؛ إِذْ إِنَّ السَّرَّاءَ إِذَا أَصَابَتْهُ شَكَرَ فَكَانَ ذَلِكَ خَيْرًا لَهُ، وَإِنْ أَصَابَتْهُ الضَّرَّاءُ صَبَرَ فَكَانَ ذَلِكَ خَيْرًا لَهُ، وَلَيْسَ ذَلِكَ لِأَحَدٍ إِلَّا لِلْمُؤْمِنِ [أخرجه مسلم في كتاب الزهد والرقائق].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, pojasnio je da je zadivljujuće stanje vjernika; ako ga zadesi radost, on zahvali i to bude dobro po njega, a ako ga zadesi nedaća, on se strpi i to bude dobro po njega, a to nije dato nikome osim vjerniku [bilježi Muslim u Knjizi o zuhdu i suptilnostima].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) clarified that the affair of the believer is entirely wondrous; if prosperity touches him, he is grateful, and that is good for him; and if adversity touches him, he is patient, and that is good for him—and this applies to none except the believer [Recorded by Muslim in the Book of Asceticism and Heart-Softening Reports].

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ النَّفْسِيُّ هُوَ مَا يُسَمِّيهِ ابْنُ تَيْمِيَّةَ بِـ"جَنَّةِ الدُّنْيَا"، حَيْثُ يَسْتَشْعِرُ الْعَبْدُ مَعِيَّةَ اللهِ وَلُطْفَهُ الْخَفِيَّ فِي طَيَّاتِ الْبَلَاءِ.
sentences.translation: Ova psihička ravnoteža je ono što Ibn Taymiyyah naziva 'dunjalučkim džennetom', gdje rob osjeća Allahovu prisutnost i Njegovu skrivenu dobrotu unutar nedaća.
sentences.translationEn: This psychological equilibrium is what Ibn Taymiyyah calls the 'Paradise of this world,' where the servant senses Allah's company and His hidden kindness within the folds of affliction.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ مَفْهُومَ التَّسْلِيمِ لَا يَعْنِي الِاسْتِسْلَامَ لِلْعَجْزِ، بَلْ هُوُ اِسْتِجْمَاعُ الْقُوَّةِ الْقَلْبِيَّةِ لِمُوَاجَهَةِ أَقْدَارِ اللهِ بِأَقْدَارِهِ.
sentences.translation: Koncept predanosti ne znači predaju nemoći, već prikupljanje srčane snage da se Allahovim određenjima suprotstavi drugim Allahovim određenjima.
sentences.translationEn: The concept of submission does not mean surrendering to helplessness; rather, it is the gathering of spiritual strength to face Allah's decrees with His other decrees.

sentences.arabic: وَيُشِيرُ الشَّيْخُ الْأَلْبَانِيُّ فِي تَعْلِيقَاتِهِ إِلَى أَنَّ الصَّبْرَ الْجَمِيلَ هُوَ الَّذِي لَا شَكْوَى فِيهِ لِلْخَلْقِ، بَلْ يَكُونُ بَثُّ الْهَمِّ وَالْحُزْنِ إِلَى الْخَالِقِ وَحْدَهُ.
sentences.translation: Šejh al-Albani u svojim komentarima ukazuje da je 'lijepo strpljenje' ono u kojem nema prigovora stvorenjima, već se briga i tuga iznose samo Stvoritelju.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh al-Albani points out in his commentaries that 'beautiful patience' is that which contains no complaint to creation, but rather the venting of grief and sorrow to the Creator alone.

sentences.arabic: فَالِابْتِلَاءُ لَيْسَ دَلِيلًا عَلَى الْهَوَانِ، بَلْ هُوَ تَمْحِيصٌ لِلْمَعَادِنِ وَرَفْعٌ لِلدَّرَجَاتِ.
sentences.translation: Iskušenje nije dokaz poniženja, već čišćenje karaktera i uzdizanje stepeni.
sentences.translationEn: Trial is not an evidence of disgrace, but a purification of character and an elevation of ranks.

sentences.arabic: فَمَنْ رَضِيَ فَلَهُ الرِّضَا، وَمَنْ سَخِطَ فَلَهُ السُّخْطُ.
sentences.translation: Ko bude zadovoljan, njemu pripada zadovoljstvo, a ko se rasrdi, njemu pripada srdžba.
sentences.translationEn: Whoever is content, for him is contentment; and whoever is resentful, for him is resentment.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، كَانَ الصَّحَابَةُ - رِضْوَانُ اللهِ عَلَيْهِمْ - يَرَوْنَ فِي الْمَصَائِبِ فُرَصًا لِتَكْفِيرِ الْخَطَايَا، مِمَّا جَعَلَهُمْ أَرْسَخَ النَّاسِ جِبَالًا فِي وُجْهِ الْأَعَاصِيرِ، مُوقِنِينَ أَنَّ مَا أَخْطَأَهُمْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيُصِيبَهُمْ، وَمَا أَصَابَهُمْ لَمْ يَكُنْ لِيُخْطِئَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Zato su ashabi, radijallahu anhum, u nevoljama vidjeli prilike za iskupljenje grijeha, što ih je učinilo postojanijim od planina pred olujama, čvrsto uvjereni da ono što ih je zaobišlo nije ih moglo pogoditi, a ono što ih je pogodilo nije ih moglo zaobići.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, the Companions (may Allah be pleased with them) viewed calamities as opportunities for the expiation of sins, which made them more steadfast than mountains in the face of storms, certain that what missed them was never meant to strike them, and what struck them was never meant to miss them.
